candidate_decisions.rationale: The patch replaces the obsolete enemy key dir_favor with turn_delay. This is an AI configuration-key defect outside the 11 B0A classes.
Power 136 already exists as Disenchant; the patch selects the new item-specific power 139. This is valid-but-semantically-wrong wiring, not a dangling reference, and no B0A class covers it.
The patch adds spawn_type=untransform to the relevant powers. This is behavior tagging outside the 11 B0A classes.

The patch adds topics and rearranges Guill dialogue and reward blocks to make the NPC action-menu flow nicer. It is a UX restructuring change, not evidence of a B0A defect.

This broad item-type and sort-order migration has no stated broken behavior or frozen required-key contract, and it introduces an override corrected by the next candidate. Engine 1.14.280 type/default semantics or issue evidence are needed to adjudicate the pre-state.
The patch removes item_type overrides so developer boots inherit their equippable feet type. This is an equipment-classification regression outside the 11 B0A classes.

case_decisions.rationale: Before the patch the map requests enemy category he_warden; the corrected category is the_warden. The typo leaves the map's enemy-category reference unresolved.
The unresolved category prevents the Warden from appearing. The Warden is the sole producer of quest item 9001, and the commit message confirms the key could not be found.

group_decisions.rationale: One config-only typo fix restores the Warden spawn and the Warden's key drop. The two labels describe distinct deterministic effects of the same root cause and therefore remain one independent fix group.

case_decisions.rationale: In the Halls of Infinity context Abasi was talker=false and had no reachable dialogue producer for emp_journal_init. The patch makes him a talker and adds the missing activation.
The same Halls of Infinity variant had no reachable journal turn-in producer. The patch adds the item handoff, reward, and emp_journal_finish transition required for completion.

group_decisions.rationale: One config-only fix restores both activation and completion of Abasi's journal quest in the Halls of Infinity variant. The two labels share one root cause and remain one independent fix group.
